## Description

As a .Net developer, you will become a member of our IT team. Together with around 20 fellow analysts, developers and testers, you will be responsible for developing our in-house applications. There are several teams, and you will be given your place in 1 of them to strengthen us operationally from our long-term vision.

**Are you…**

- someone who is energised by a pragmatic, solution-oriented and efficient approach?
- an agile team player who likes to inspire and be inspired?
- a tech-savvy doer who dares to question the status quo and strives for reliable and future-oriented software solutions?

**Your role as a developer at ECS:**

- Develop new software applications in .NET and Angular
- Maintaining and extending existing applications and interfaces to customers and suppliers
- Write robust and secure code within the defined software processes
- Work on varied projects in which you convert complex business questions into scalable IT solutions
- Work independently as well as in a team and are not afraid of hard deadlines
- Take initiative, dare to think out of the box but still work in a solution-oriented way

## Profile

**Profile:**

- **Higher degree** in computer science or equivalent through experience
- At least **3 years' experience in .NET development**
- Good knowledge of **C# .NET** and front-end framework
- Good knowledge of **MS SQL Server, TSQL** and **ASP.NET Core**
- **Broad general ICT knowledge**, you understand how systems and networks work
- Experience with **Azure** or willing to learn
- Fluent in **Dutch** and **English**
- Knowledge of **Kubernetes, Docker** is a nice to have
- **Event Driven Architecture** and **Domain Driven Design** are also nice to haves
- Affinity with the **logistics/transport** sector

[Apply online](https://ecs.hr-technologies.com/front/en/vacancies/145/apply)

Ready to take your career to the next level? Dive into the world of logistics at ECS, the beating heart of the port of Zeebrugge. As a leading player in the logistics sector, we offer you not just any job, but an opportunity for personal growth, innovation and international connections!

**Our offer**

- **Work environment**: step into a dynamic and innovative work environment, with the values of a family business
- **Conditions**: enjoy attractive remuneration and working conditions, complemented by fringe benefits
- **Growth**: discover numerous career opportunities and build your future within ECS
- **Development**: get opportunities to further develop your knowledge and skills through numerous internal and external training courses
- **Culture**: join a corporate culture where wellbeing is key
- **Activities**: take part in fun activities and sports sessions after work
- **Childcare (only headquarters in Zeebrugge)**: take advantage of our in-house childcare for a perfect work-life balance

**Ready for a new challenge?**

Apply now and take your first step towards a new career!
